title: Scaling AI Infrastructure for Global Resilience
description: Exploration of how to scale AI training and inference pipelines globally while ensuring high availability and fault tolerance in hybrid cloud environments.

title: The Future of DevSecOps: Automated Security in CI/CD
description: Deep dive into automated vulnerability scanning and security policy enforcement directly within modern development workflows.

title: Rust for Mission-Critical Systems: Lessons Learned
description: A technical retrospective on migrating critical system components from C++ to Rust, focusing on memory safety and performance benchmarks.

title: Event-Driven Microservices at Extreme Scale
description: Strategies for managing state and consistency in distributed systems handling millions of events per second using Kafka and modern orchestrators.

title: Quantum Computing: Preparing Your Cryptography Today
description: Understanding the timeline for post-quantum cryptography and how to start implementing lattice-based algorithms in current security stacks.

title: Kubernetes in 2026: Beyond Containers
description: An overview of how Kubernetes has evolved to manage heterogeneous workloads, from WebAssembly modules to edge computing nodes.
